meaning: n.(车胎)爆裂,喷出,保险丝烧断,井中喷水或油等
examples: Once in a while we had a major blowout.
A truck travelling south had a blowout and crashed.
The article 'Budget and blowout guide to Budapest' was published in partnership with BBC Olive magazine.
Blowout preventers are not new technology, but BP has had issues with them before.
